title: Block-equivalent finite Gabor frames
author_string: Oleg Asipchuk, Laura De Carli, Luis Rodriguez
abstract: We study finite systems of vectors whose frame operator matrices are unitarily equivalent, via explicit and computationally efficient unitary transformations, to block-diagonal matrices. We call such systems block-equivalent.   We show that a Gabor system $\mathcal{G}=\mathcal{G}(g,L\times K)\subset \mathbb C^N$ is block-equivalent when either the modulation set $L$ or the translation set $K$ is a subgroup of $\mathbb Z_N$. We also characterize situations in which the frame operator matrix becomes diagonal.   Finally, we show that geometric conditions on subsets of $\mathbb Z_N$ force certain diagonals of the frame operator matrix of $\mathcal{G}$ to vanish, yielding additional sparsity and block structures.
